description: I am elated to have found Amberscript because it's all about trading in a few dollars to save our precious time, that's otherwise spent in writing subtitles, and speech scripts manually.
author: Arun Sarathy P.
pros: Amberscript has become a game-changer in my video production workflow. I usually write my video subtitles and sometimes podcast scripts after listening to my own words. It's a time consuming process and quite monotonous. But after I started using Amberscript, all I have to do is drag and drop my audio file into Amberscript, and then the script text is generated magically. It neatly captures my words spoken in English. The beauty is that it has multiple accent options just for English. So, even if you are a non-native English-speaking person, Amberscript can help. It has a neat editor within which we can edit the text easily using keyboard shortcuts, too. There is also a way to select the portion of text and it shows where in audio file waveform it's located. Its transcribing process works with AI capabilities - and that means it "learns" our words and tries to reduce the errors eventually.
cons: With all its greatness, it still is not perfect. I have to do a final review to see if it picked all my spoken words correctly. Thanks to the text editor, I can search, edit directly in the editor. That being said, its transcription engine is in fact powerful and picks correctly almost 97% of the time. The hours limit duration is also quite less in their plans, in my opinion. However, we can purchase additional hours on a case-to-case basis.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Amberscript is a musthave for interviewers and editors
description: Easy to setup and use. Good quality.
author: Jos W.
pros: You have a spoken interview transcribed in no time. The Dutch (AI) text-to-speech function is the best I've seen. Good enough to save tons of time.
cons: Can't think of anything now. Maybe integration with other software could be better. But uploading single files to Amberscript does the job for me. Certainly if I compare it to the time lost when I was transcribing everything myself.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Ambescript has made some great improvements
author: Elysia V.
pros: Amberscript is wonderful if you want to create blogs and other content from your videos.
cons: Amberscript has a subtitle option. However, it is not very customizable. This is what I originally purchased Amberscript for. But I still use it.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Amberscript - a real relieve for transcriptions
author: Hermann S.
pros: Works easy, is fast, I can always come back to old recordings on my account, an efficient help!
cons: Sometimes I have interviews with non-British nor American partners who speak in English... On non-Germans who speak in German... And do not know it too well. What is worse, their pronounciation is not the "original" one. Then we sometimes come to a certain border because the software seems to be trained by natives of the respective languages. Would be good to teach it as well in "Conference English" or "Conference German". Guess that would also improve in the future.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: Great program, very useful and helpful in transcribing interviews. Saves some time, yet less than I was hoping for.
author: Sanja A.
pros: It is very user friendly, great graphics, great that you can see the shortcuts at any moment. Helpful in analyzing long interviews.
cons: Not all the words (especially jargon) are being understood and the program does not learn from mistakes it makes. That results in still tedious long work to adjust the automatically transcribed conversations. I was a little bit disappointed by the amount of work it still is to work out the interviews.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Easy to use, easy to understand, easy to get the invoice.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I've just bought 60 minutes of audio-translation fro 15 €. My interview was ready in 10 minutes and the text was 90% in line with the actual speech. I can't think of a more precise service.
cons: There's nothing wrong in the service. Of course I'd appreciate more accuracy in the translation.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Big timesaver, but also save some time for final editing of transcriptions
description: Instead of spotting lists for editing, I now use my own database inside amberscript. It works perfect.
author: Arnold V.
pros: the ease of the audio player connected with the transcription is brilliant to use while sitting next to the editor. Also that you can formulate a starting timecode, which makes it sync with the original timeline in the editing software.
cons: It's still quite some work to do the final editing, but allltogether it's a big plus.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Michael M.
pros: 20 Minutes interviews with 20 questions and answers is hard to integrate i an edit. For me it's easier to read and mark answers instead of scrolling through the material. The Timecode is in the word document, so the orientiation is perfect.
cons: The possibilities of formating the word documents could be better.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Arno K.
pros: the combination of the video, the self reading tekst and the transcript
cons: the price you have to pay, it is too expensive for a student
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Generally good - sometimes it likes to drop out on me, but in general I feel satisfied.
author: Abby W.
pros: It works generally very well - it has cut down a lot on my transcription time, and in general, the software is good and transcribes well.
cons: Has problems with some English accents, which is annoying. I interview people all over Europe and normally it's fine, but northern English accents are a problem that I have to spend a lot of time fixing.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Adquirí una suscripción para realizar transcripciones por lotes, aunque hace su trabajo, no es la mejor.
author: Fray Agustin G.
pros: Plataforma para transcripción automática de archivos de audio y video. Permite hacer modificaciones a las transcripciones.
cons: El costo es una principal limitante, además de que en idioma español comete errores constantes en ciertas palabras que hacen referencia a instituciones o lugares geográficos.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excelente trascriptor, versátil y fiel al audio.
description: Muy importante para ejercicios de investigación cualitativa
author: Diego B.
pros: Es una plataforma muy versátil con trascripciones muy fieles
cons: Sugiero ajustar "loops" para realizar seguimiento al audio sin necesidad de parar.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Hasta el momento todo va muy bien
author: Daniela O.
pros: Es muy rapido, sencillo de uso y te ofrece 10 minutos gratis para iniciar.
cons: Que sea de paga, pero en general vale la pena
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Esther K.
pros: Ideaal om gesproken tekst uit te werken!
cons: Moet nog even uitzoeken hoe ik ga kopieren.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Marcus G.
pros: How there is an easy to do an convertion of text
cons: The length it takes for the autoconvertor
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Mi experiencia con Amberscript en general es muy buena.
author: Jonatan T.
pros: El software es muy simple de usar e intuitivo. Cualquiera podría utilizarlo sin tener muchos conocimientos de informática.
cons: En mi caso, el software tiene algunas fallas y no salva mi progreso en el trabajo o simplemente se recarga solo.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Davide Isidoro P.
pros: permette di ottenere la trascrizione di un video senza dover prendere appunti
cons: nella prova gratuita le funzionalità sono limitate e per aver una trascrizione senza errori bisogna pagare
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: AI transcribe was unable to distinguish male and female voices
description: I would not use it again for the purpose of transcribing a casual conversation or interview.
author: Sarah M.
pros: It is easy to use. The file upload process is fast. The interface is user friendly. Allows Paypal checkout.
cons: While the voices are clear, I anticipated some errors due to the music in the background (no lyrics) and one speaker's accent. I paid for the AI version thinking I could save time by using the time stamps and basic outline of the transcription to make my work faster. Unfortunately, this service could not differentiate well between the male and female speakers without long breaks between sentences. It also showed very very low accuracy for the non-native english speaker, and only moderate to low accuracy for the native speaker.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I am transcribing some interviews, collecting data from my master's degree and amberscript is being very useful to me.. I think amberscript is very user friendly. I chose the cheapest plan because the real-dollar exchange rate is 5.00. I wish that when adjusting the text I could use bold and other word features. Thank you very much"
author: Nélia M.
pros: I liked it a lot because it helped me with the manual work of the researcher.
cons: Maybe you can use word features in the transcribed text.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Andrea L.
pros: Works perfectly, identifies mostly flawlessly many accents and different intonations.
cons: No copy paste. Having to work with internet.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: It was really fast. the transcription was correct. I have a good experience.
author: Marie L.
pros: I love that it divides automatically in different speakers. That German is available. (it is not available in a lot of transcription software) I also like that I can choose to let it transcibe from a person. I looove. That I can let the audio play while editing.
cons: I didn't use it so much. But I would like to have some options for comments
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great tool for very fast transcriptions
description: I was really surprised how exactly, accurate and even under bad surround sound circumstances the software recognized the voices to deliver a good basic text to save much time.
author: Markus F.
pros: The easy to use functions with a good pricing system, to do automatic transcriptions.
cons: There is nearly nothing yet. Only a "copy & paste" function would be great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best solution to save work and time!
author: Nithushaa I.
pros: The automatic transcription with less time
cons: It is too expensive for students. I would prefer some student offer packages.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Mi herramienta favorita para generar subtítulos en español
description: Mi labor como creadora de contenido se simplifica muchísimo con AmberScript. Es rápido, intuitivo y los subtítulos son precisos.
author: Caterina D.
pros: La facilidad de uso y el hecho de que generen subtítulos automáticos de bastante buena calidad en castellano.
cons: No he encontrado ningún aspecto negativo digno de mencionar, ¡buen trabajo equipo! Únicamente seguir mejorando la precisión de los subtítulos automáticos.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Salma T.
pros: earning easly money by posting subtitles
cons: the complication of registration and work
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
